text.title: process-mining-automation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for process-mining-automation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Proceeding to algorithm selection with only case_id/activity/timestamp columns validated, skipping timestamp format, case-ID consistency, and vocabulary size checks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Even a structurally valid log fails when timestamps are date-only (no ordering within a day), case IDs cross process boundaries, or activity labels are free-text — each produces a spaghetti DFG or unsound Petri net that wastes the entire mining effort.

failure-mode.description: Conflating process mining (reconstructing flows from system logs) with task mining (desktop click recording) or with BPM (modeling desired processes).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Incorrect categorization leads to wrong tool purchase: Celonis for task-mining needs, or UiPath Task Mining for a conformance-checking goal. Budget is wasted and the initiative fails on deliverable mismatch.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated event-log columns. LLMs invent plausible column names ("CaseKey", "EventTime") that do not exist.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always pin the actual column list in the prompt; do not let the agent infer.

failure-mode.description: Algorithm name confusion. "Inductive Miner" has three variants (basic, infrequent, directly-follows).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents will pick whichever appeared more often in training data. Force the variant name.

failure-mode.description: Soundness vs fitness misreport. LLMs will report "fitness 0.95" and call the model good even when soundness is False.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both metrics must be returned and the BA must check soundness first.

failure-mode.description: Spaghetti DFG presented as success. Agents do not "see" graph unreadability; they will deliver a 600-node SVG and call the task done.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add a node/edge count gate to the workflow (e.g., abort if >40 nodes without explicit override).

failure-mode.description: Privacy regression. Agents that re-derive activity labels from free-text fields can re-introduce PII that was scrubbed upstream.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Vendor demo overconfidence. Agents primed with vendor marketing copy parrot capability claims.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force vendor questions to be answered from documentation URLs, not memory.

failure-mode.description: Conformance against fictional model. Agents happily run conformance against a BPMN drawn from a wishful-thinking SOP.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The reference model must itself be validated by a human SME first.
